meta.title: About
meta.description: Esther's work style is mysterious and surreal. She is used to presenting in a jumping and obscure way as well as combined with delicate brush strokes in order to convey warmth and connect with viewers.

contentList.text:
Yi Shan is a Taiwanese visual artist based in the UK. Her work explores emotions, solitude, and personal growth through quiet self-reflection. With warm yet subtly mysterious imagery, she weaves metaphorical stories and intentional negative space, allowing viewers to enter their own emotional landscapes. 

She hopes to create meaningful connections and to grow as a professional storyteller, sharing messages with the world.

伊珊是台灣視覺創作者，現居英國。她的創作圍繞情緒、孤獨與成長，常以自我對話作為出發點，將內在狀態轉化為溫馨而帶有神秘感的畫面。她擅長運用隱喻說故事，刻意保留留白，讓觀者在畫面中投射自身的感受與想像。

她期望透過創作建立情感上的連結，成為一位能傳遞訊息、產生影響力的創作者。曾與刊物及多項商業專案合作，並獲得多項國際插畫獎項肯定。
